goal_text:
You are planning your trip in Cambridge.
You are looking for a 'train'. The train should 'arrive by 13:30' and should go to 'peterborough'.
The train should leave on 'wednesday' and should depart from 'cambridge'.
Make sure you get 'train ID' and 'departure time'.
You are also looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the type of 'museum'.
Make sure you get 'postcode' and 'address'.Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are planning your trip in Cambridge
You are looking for a train. The train should arrive by 13:30 and should go to peterborough
The train should leave on wednesday and should depart from cambridge
Make sure you get train ID and departure time
You are also looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the type of museum
Make sure you get postcode and address
